prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ASR-SURVIVALMYLAREMERGENCYBODY Product Type: BLANKET Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: (4-Pack) SOS Bright Orange Survival Mylar Blanket Emergency First Aid Heat Retention Themal Blankets Description: You can never be too prepared when you decide to trek into the wilderness. Make sure you have an emergency blanket with you that will keep you warm in unpleasant weather.

This oversized mylar emergency blanket is big enough to cover your entire body. Normal blankets are prone to getting damp and thus become useless when trying to sleep in outdoor conditions. This blanket will not only keep you warm but the foil material will keep it from getting dirty and wet.

Campers and outdoorsy people alike will find this emergency blanket to be a necessary part of their camping kit. Don't miss out on this opportunity to be especially prepared. Search Terms: military MRE survivalist edc carry bag safe travel storm weather emergency outdoor survival safety blanket fire resistant mylar foil blanket large size body cover bivvy sack camping hiking essential safe pack Features: - EXTREME ELEMENTS DEFENSE: Never be caught in the cold; the ASR Outdoor Reusable Thermal Mylar Emergency Blanket - RETAIN 95% BODY HEAT: The interior reflect back and retain 95% of your body heat for prolonged warmth and dryness, helping to regulate the circulatory system and to assist in preventing the body from entering a state of shock or hypothermia - RESISTANT TO THE ELEMENTS: Wind, Water, and Flame Retardant Material - DIMENSIONS: Compacted: 5" x 1" x 1" (LWH), Expanded - 84" x 52" - HIGH VISIBILITY: Reflective Surface provides High Visibility === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 4-Pack Bright Orange Survival Mylar Blanket

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 4-Pk Orange Survival Mylar Emergency Blanket

anthropic.title_differentiation: Retains 95 Body Heat, Water And Flame Resistant, 84 X 52 In, High Visibility, Reusable Emergency Blanket

openai.title_differentiation: Reflective Heat Retention, Retains 95 Percent Body Heat, Wind Water And Flame Resistant, High Visibility
